title: 鬼頭明里 1st LIVE TOUR「Colorful Closet」
descriptionFirst:
【SET LIST】-Opening-／M01.Swinging Heart／M02.Always Going My Way／M03.INNOCENT／M04.CRAZY ROCK NIGHT／M05.Drawing a Wish／M06.dear my distance／M07.Star Arc／M08.Closer／M09.23時の春雷少女／-Band＆Dancer Time-／M10.ロケット（character song）／M11.Starry（cover）／M12.Desire Again／M13.キミのとなりで／M14.Tiny Light／-ENCORE-／EN01.君の花を祈ろう／EN02.Fly-High-Five!
